title: Odontites serotinus
taxonomy: Odontites serotinus is a plant species that belongs to the family Orobanchaceae. It is a type of broomrape, a group of flowering plants known for their parasitic nature. Within the Orobanchaceae family, Odontites serotinus is classified into the genus Odontites. The plant is native to Europe and Western Asia. As a member of the broomrape family, Odontites serotinus has unique characteristics that set it apart from other flowering plants.
